title: ml.flush_job

job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job.

advance_time.description: Refer to the description for the `advance_time` query parameter.

calc_interim.description: Refer to the description for the `calc_interim` query parameter.

end.description: Refer to the description for the `end` query parameter.

skip_time.description: Refer to the description for the `skip_time` query parameter.

start.description: Refer to the description for the `start` query parameter.

description:
Force buffered data to be processed.

The flush jobs API is only applicable when sending data for analysis using
the post data API. Depending on the content of the buffer, then it might
additionally calculate new results. Both flush and close operations are
similar, however the flush is more efficient if you are expecting to send
more data for analysis. When flushing, the job remains open and is available
to continue analyzing data. A close operation additionally prunes and
persists the model state to disk and the job must be opened again before
analyzing further data.
